name: Check related books section in LYRASIS
fullName: Book detail view screen: Check related books section in LYRASIS
statusMessage: Related books section is not displayed
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Related books section is not displayed
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.isRelatedBooksExists(BookDetailsSteps.java:238)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search 'available' book of distributor 'Bibliotheca' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
And  Related books section is displayed on book details screen
steps.statusMessage: Related books section is not displayed
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Related books section is not displayed

steps.name: And  There is a list of related books on book details screen
And  More button in related books section is available on book details screen
